_fixture_meta.label: negative
_fixture_meta.notes: USDC — regulated stablecoin with freeze authority (OFAC compliance). Fires D01 S1 (freeze_authority active) at low confidence but jup_strict=true attenuates. Critical edge case: legitimate freeze authority use. Negative for rug/concentration purposes.

d01_honeypot.reason: Freeze authority active → S1 fires (raw+=0.25). No transfer_fee, no permanent_delegate, no transfer_hook. raw=0.25 → sigmoid(-0.55)≈0.37. jup_strict=true context attenuates; simulation expected to PASS (Circle compliance freeze ≠ sell block). Confidence band 0.20–0.35 represents static-only Low severity. This is the 'static-positive, simulation-negative' calibration fixture per D01 design §10.

d02_rug_pull.reason: No DEX pools. D02 emits no-pool Info event. mint_authority active is NOT a D02 signal (D02 is LP-drain focused). Signal B cannot fire without a pool row.

d03_concentration.reason: 2.8M holders. Top-10 liquid share is << 80% ceiling. No concentration signals fire.

d04_pump_dump.reason: No swaps_1h data in fixture (Phase 1 fixture). No volume spike. D04 BELOW.

d05_wash_trading_h1.reason: No round-trip data in fixture (Phase 1 fixture). D05 BELOW.

d06_mint_burn_anomaly.reason: Signal A: mint_authority active. is_established_protocol=true. conf dampened to 0.10 Info.
